summary: BLOCK 85.1/85.2/85.3 testing complete. Backend API tests all pass (11/11). Frontend UI tests mostly pass. Global Rarity Engine, demote endpoint, and UI styling verified working.

integration_issues.issue: RarityCard component exists but is NOT rendered on RecordDetailPage. Only RarityPill is shown. The test feature 'BLOCK 85.1: Rarity card shows Owners, Wantlist, and For Sale counts' is not implemented on the detail page - component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/RarityBadge.js but RecordDetailPage only imports RarityPill

action_items: Add RarityCard component to RecordDetailPage to show Owners, Wantlist, and For Sale counts (component already exists, just needs to be imported and rendered)
critical_code_review_comments: RarityCard component is defined in /app/frontend/src/components/RarityBadge.js but not used in RecordDetailPage - intentional or missing?

success_rate.frontend: 92% (all features working except RarityCard not shown on detail page)

seed_data_creation: Created test ISO items during demote workflow testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 85 features all working: (1) Rarity API returns tier based on discogs community.have count, (2) Demote endpoint reverts OPEN ISO to WISHLIST, (3) ISOCard shows gold Zap bolt and Back to Dreams link on OPEN items, (4) Dream List buttons are 32px with correct styling, (5) Variant pills have 70% max-width. Only potential issue: RarityCard with Owners/Wantlist/For Sale counts not rendered on RecordDetailPage (component exists but not used).

BLOCK_85_1_rarity_engine.rarity_tier_calculation: PASS - Ultra Rare(<500), Rare(500-2500), Uncommon(2500-5000), Common(5001+)
BLOCK_85_1_rarity_engine.rarity_pill_on_detail_page: PASS - Shows 'GLOBAL RARITY: COMMON' with Brushed Gold Glass style
BLOCK_85_1_rarity_engine.rarity_card_with_counts: PARTIAL - Component exists but NOT rendered on RecordDetailPage

BLOCK_85_2_demote_pipeline.demote_endpoint: PASS - PUT /api/iso/{id}/demote reverts OPEN to WISHLIST
BLOCK_85_2_demote_pipeline.gold_lightning_bolt: PASS - Zap icon shows on OPEN/Seeking items
BLOCK_85_2_demote_pipeline.back_to_dreams_link: PASS - Link shows 'Back to Dreams' on own OPEN items
BLOCK_85_2_demote_pipeline.demote_removes_from_seeking: PASS - Item removed from active seeking list after demote

BLOCK_85_3_boutique_ui.button_height_32px: PASS - Dream List buttons have h-8 (32px height)
BLOCK_85_3_boutique_ui.actively_seeking_border: PASS - 1px solid rgb(218, 165, 32) DAA520 border with transparent bg
